summary: Iteration 5 testing complete. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Theme system fully functional with 5 themes (Light, Dark, Forest, Ocean, Sand). Light theme is default. Theme persists after page reload via localStorage. All 7 navigation pages working. All previous features verified.

issues: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility (console warning from previous iteration)

passed_tests: Login page renders correctly at /login with Google sign-in button
All API endpoints return 401 without auth
GET /api/auth/me works with valid token
Dashboard page loads with summary cards (Total Balance, Income, Expenses, Net Savings)
Dashboard shows charts (Expense Breakdown pie chart, Monthly Trend bar chart)
Dashboard has Export Backup button
Accounts page shows accounts with email filter badges
Accounts page Add Account dialog has email_filter input field
Transactions page shows AI Categorize button and transaction list
Settings page shows email config and backup/restore sections
Theme picker button is visible in sidebar (Palette icon)
Theme picker opens and shows 5 themes (Light, Dark, Forest, Ocean, Sand)
Clicking Dark theme changes --app-bg to #111111
Clicking Forest theme changes --app-bg to #0f1a0f
Clicking Ocean theme changes --app-bg to #EEF4F8
Clicking Sand theme changes --app-bg to #F5F0E8
Theme persists after page reload (localStorage key: app-theme)
Light theme is the default when no preference is set
Navigation works across all 7 pages (Dashboard, Accounts, Transactions, Upload, Analytics, Categories, Settings)
POST /api/accounts creates account with email_filter field
POST /api/email-config saves email configuration
GET /api/email-config returns configured status
GET /api/backup/export returns full user data (accounts, transactions, categories)
POST /api/backup/import restores data without duplicates
PWA manifest.json is accessible
Upload page loads with account selector and file input

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages, theme system, and interactions working)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test accounts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Theme system fully implemented with 5 themes: light (default), dark, forest, ocean, sand. Theme picker is a Palette icon button in sidebar footer (data-testid='theme-toggle-btn'). Each theme option has data-testid='theme-{key}'. Theme stored in localStorage under 'app-theme' key. CSS variables applied to document.documentElement. All previous features from iterations 1-4 still working: Google Auth, accounts with email_filter, transactions with AI categorize, settings with email config and backup/restore, PWA manifest.
